programme.title: California's Gold
programme.desc: Classic teardrop trailers which sleep two and have built-in kitchens.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: The U.S. and the Holocaust
programme.desc: A group of government officials supports rescue operations; the public sees for the first time the scale of the Holocaust as Allies liberate German camps.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Simon Schama: The Holocaust, 80 Years On
programme.desc: Historian Simon Schama examines the Holocaust as a worldwide crime and its impact today, 80 years after the liberation of Auschwitz.

programme.title: The Ship That Turned Back
programme.desc: The dramatic escape of Irving Saraf, from Poland to Palestine in 1940, when he was only seven years old.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Actors Ted Danson, Mary Steenburgen and William H. Macy trace their nonconformist ancestors back to the Puritan establishment.

programme.title: The Ship That Turned Back

programme.title: Nature Cat
programme.sub-title: Moss Mouse; Leaf Moving Machine Mayhem
programme.desc: Nature Cat and his pals find an injured baby fox while playing Wild Animal Rescue.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Lyla Can't Sleep; Hairdos and Hair Don'ts
programme.desc: Lyla struggles to sleep and tries to figure out what is wrong with her sleep routine; Lyla tries to do her own hairstyle.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Dream Bouncy Castle for her party; Francine and Muffy set up their older siblings.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: Xs and Os; Dr. O No
programme.desc: Agents from the Big O's office threaten to shut down Odd Squad; Oona meets Dr. O's replacement.

programme.title: Wild Kratts

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters learn how temperatures can affect outdoor plants and gardens.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla and Everett play basketball against their moms; Lyla and Luke restore their old toy car to make it special for Stu.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.desc: Carl can't wait for the ice cream festival; Carl is upset that he has to wear a cast on his broken wrist.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Plays T-ball; Max Plays at the Library
programme.desc: Daniel and his friends play T-ball and find that Henrietta is a dance teacher and a T-ball coach.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay set a new record for the longest paper airplane fight; Phoebe and Jay learn how to build a stable pillow fort.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: TJ is excited to meet his favorite comic book artist Bobby Manalo, and to make him feel welcomed on Sesame Street, TJ makes him a comic book gift with the help of Tamir; while working on it, Tamir also learns to say a few words in Tagalog.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: The Treeborhood Photo Album; Runway Recycling
programme.desc: Zadie creates a Treeborhood photo album to trace the growth of their beloved tree from little to very big; Mr. E judges a sculpture contest.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.sub-title: Just Him and Me; Duck Ducks Concert
programme.desc: Donkey feels jealous when Grampy gives Panda a piano lesson; Duck Duck is disappointed when she misses her favorite band.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: Rosie Gets Moving; The Flying Disc Dilemma
programme.desc: Rosie, Javi and Papa use different kinds of transportation to bring Tia her lucky spoon before her train leaves; Crystal's disc gets stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Martin and Chris observe wild cats and dogs interacting with each other on the African savanna.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Molly and Vera think about teaching more tourists in Qyah about wildfire prevention; Molly can't wait to hunt for seagull eggs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A W.W. Denslow-inscribed "The Wonderful Wizard of Oz"; a Mercury space capsule wind tunnel model; black opal ring.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: Washington Week With The Atlantic
programme.desc: A panel of journalists provides reporting and analysis of the major stories emanating from the United States capital.

programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover
programme.desc: Actor and filmmaker Ben McKenzie unpacks his documentary "Everyone Is Lying to You for Money" and why he argues the crypto boom is built on hype, risk, and deception.

programme.title: Robert Redford: Star of the Silver Screen
programme.desc: The career of actor, director and producer Robert Redford, including his work promoting independent film through the Sundance Film Festival and Institute and his commitment to environmental and political causes.

programme.title: Great Performances
programme.sub-title: Now Hear This: The Call of Istanbul
programme.desc: Exploring the layered sounds of Istanbul where empires met from European classical music to modern jazz.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: International Jazz Day From Abu Dhabi
programme.desc: Jazz and blues musicians from around the globe gather to celebrate the power of music; host Jeremy Irons.

programme.title: Clive Davis: The Soundtrack of Our Lives
programme.desc: The life and work of music producer Clive Davis.

programme.sub-title: The Fake Mustache Collection; The Lint Dinosaur Collection

programme.title: Skillsville
programme.desc: Fashion designer Rae learns how to make her creations both fashionable and functional; veterinarian Dev uses the process of elimination to diagnose his animal patients and help them feel better.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: Opposition in colonial North America to British policies over taxes, land and sovereignty escalates into violent confrontation; war gives 13 colonies a common cause.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: Congress puts George Washington in command of a new Continental Army; Congress declares American independence in July 1776.

programme.title: Ken Burns: One Nation, Many Stories
programme.desc: Exploring the work of filmmaker Ken Burns, including "Country Music," "Muhammad Ali," "Benjamin Franklin," "The U.S. and the Holocaust," "The American Buffalo," "The Vietnam War" and more.

programme.title: Change Your Brain, Change Your Pain With Daniel Amen, MD
programme.desc: Dr. Daniel Amen maps the brain networks that drive physical and emotional pain and reveals his practical, brain-based strategies that help you feel better, think clearer and live more fully.

programme.title: Coyote Crossing
programme.desc: Southern California residents and coyotes learn to coexist in the urban landscape.

programme.title: Horizons From PBS News
programme.desc: Science, health, technology and environment experts and professionals address issues such as artificial intelligence, medicine and climate science.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Actors Ted Danson, Mary Steenburgen and William H. Macy trace their nonconformist ancestors back to the Puritan establishment.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items reflect 250 years of American art, artifacts, crafts and collectibles; finds include a flag quilt circa 1880, a Tiffany Studios turtleback glass shade circa 1915 and an 1884 Edison light bulb.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A day of horse racing is suspended when an alcoholic horse trainer is found murdered in the stables; Barnaby and Scott are called in to investigate.
